data.name: JsonSchemaClassNameNotCreated
data.value: The JSON Schema class name has not been created.

data.name: JsonSchemaClassScopeNotCreated
data.value: The JSON Schema class scope has not been created.

data.name: JsonPropertyNamesEscapedClassNameNotCreated
data.value: The JsonPropertyNamesEscaped class name has not been created.

data.name: JsonPropertyNamesEscapedClassScopeNotCreated
data.value: The JsonPropertyNamesEscaped class scope has not been created.

data.name: JsonPropertyNamesPrebakedClassNameNotCreated
data.value: The JsonPropertyNamesPrebaked class name has not been created.

data.name: JsonPropertyNamesClassNameNotCreated
data.value: The JsonPropertyNames class name has not been created.

data.name: JsonPropertyNamesClassScopeNotCreated
data.value: The JsonPropertyNames class scope has not been created.

data.name: BuilderClassNameNotCreated
data.value: The Builder class name has not been created.

data.name: ArrayBuilderClassNameNotCreated
data.value: The ArrayBuilder class name has not been created.

data.name: ObjectBuilderClassNameNotCreated
data.value: The ObjectBuilder class name has not been created.

data.name: BuilderClassScopeNotCreated
data.value: The Builder class scope has not been created.

data.name: SourceClassNameNotCreated
data.value: The Source class name has not been created.

data.name: SourceClassScopeNotCreated
data.value: The Source class scope has not been created.

data.name: MutableClassNameNotCreated
data.value: The Mutable class name has not been created.

data.name: MutableClassScopeNotCreated
data.value: The Mutable class scope has not been created.

data.name: ConstantsClassNameNotCreated
data.value: The Constants class name has not been created.

data.name: ConstantsClassScopeNotCreated
data.value: The Constants class scope has not been created.

data.name: EnumValuesClassNameNotCreated
data.value: The EnumValues class name has not been created.

data.name: EnumValuesClassScopeNotCreated
data.value: The EnumValues class scope has not been created.

data.name: ExpectedNumericTypeName
data.value: Expected numeric type name.

data.name: ExpectedArrayItemsTypeName
data.value: Expected an array items type name.

data.name: ExpectedCSharpLanguageProvider
data.value: Expected a CSharpLanguageProvider.

data.name: DotnetNamespaceMetadataNotAvailable
data.value: The dotnet namespace metadata is not available.

data.name: DotnetTypeNameMetadataNotAvailable
data.value: The .NET type name metadata is not available.

data.name: CannotUseCanReduceToAnyOfDuringTypeBuild
data.value: You cannot use CanReduceToAnyOf during the type build process.

data.name: CannotUseCanReduceToOneOfDuringTypeBuild
data.value: You cannot use CanReduceToOneOf during the type build process.

data.name: CannotUseRequiresValueKindDuringTypeBuild
data.value: You cannot use RequiresValueKind during the type build process.

data.name: UnableToGetValidationConstants
data.value: Unable to get validation constants for keyword.

data.name: UnableToGetMultipleOfValidationConstants
data.value: Unable to get validation constants for multipleOf-type keyword.

data.name: UnsupportedOperator
data.value: Unsupported operator: {0}

data.name: ContainsCountVariableNameNotSet
data.value: You must set the contains count variable name.

data.name: UniqueItemsCountVariableNameNotSet
data.value: You must set the uniqueItems count variable name.

data.name: UniqueItemsHashSetVariableNameNotSet
data.value: You must set the uniqueItems hash set variable name.

data.name: ExpectedNumericConstantValue
data.value: Expected constant value to be a number that can be represented as an int or double. Actual value: {0}

data.name: UnableToFindSchemaEvaluationPathProvider
data.value: Unable to find schema evaluation path provider for dependent schema.

data.name: RequiredKeywordMustNotBeNull
data.value: The required keyword must not be null on a required propertiesByKeyword.

data.name: UnsupportedJsonValueKind
data.value: Unsupported JsonValueKind: {0}

data.name: UnsupportedFrameworkType
data.value: Unsupported framework type: {0}

data.name: UnsupportedConstantValue
data.value: Unsupported constant value.

data.name: UnexpectedValueKind
data.value: Unexpected value kind.

data.name: NullNamesNotPermitted
data.value: Null names are not permitted.

data.name: NoParameterNameWasSet
data.value: No parameter name was set.

data.name: ValueMustBePositive
data.value: Value must be positive.

data.name: DestinationArrayTooSmall
data.value: Destination array is too small.
